  "findings": [
    "Severe honeycombing observed in the concrete structure due to inadequate consolidation/missed vibration.",
    "Structural integrity and durability are compromised, exposing reinforcement to environmental degradation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform non-destructive testing (NDT) or core drilling to determine the depth and extent of the honeycombing.",
    "Chip away loose, unconsolidated concrete down to sound aggregate and clean the exposed area.",
    "Apply an approved structural repair mortar or pressure-grout the voids in accordance with ACI standards."
  ],
  "rationale": "The presence of honeycombing indicates that the concrete was not properly consolidated during placement, violating ACI 301 and ACI 304 standards. Because the asset is already in service, this defect reduces the load-bearing capacity and allows moisture penetration, which can lead to rapid corrosion of internal reinforcement and structural failure.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 (Specifications for Structural Concrete)",
    "ACI 304R (Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete)"
  ]
}
